name: jahns-workflow
description: SSOT-anchored agentic development workflow harness: Socratic project ideation that forges the north-star SSOT, one-click project setup, a structured task-registry CLI (read/mutate/archive without slurping the file) with a global naming convention, zero-token roadmap rendering, round closeout, a per-round markdown review request for an external reviewer that reads the repo over git, verbatim review ingestion (plus an optional SHA-bound PR review-cycle merge gate), and /improve: an advisory report mined from your actual Claude Code session history and review evidence — deterministic trace/audit with provenance-labeled facts, recommendations you accept or reject (recorded, never auto-applied).
